  • Reference

    • Kfz-Daten – Österreich (Neuzulassungen & Bestand)

Quickly View a Data Frame

v.Rd

A convenience wrapper around DT::datatable() for fast, nicely formatted interactive table previews. Numeric columns are automatically rounded and alignment issues are handled via column adjustment.

Usage

v(
  df,
  title = NULL,
  digits = 1,
  n_rows = 25,
  font_size = "10px",
  header_font_size = "11px"
)

Arguments

df

A data frame (or tibble) to display.

title

Character. An optional title for the table.

digits

Integer. Number of decimal places for numeric columns. Defaults to 1.

n_rows

The numbers of rows shown by default.

font_size

Character. CSS font size for body cells. Defaults to "10px".

header_font_size

Character. CSS font size for column headers. Defaults to "11px".

Value

A DT::datatable widget.
